statements.status_notes: Go stdlib CVEs flagged against the kubectl go.mod (go 1.26.0). Overlaps #137195/#139510. Remediated by scheduled Go toolchain bumps already merged/in progress across supported branches; a maintainer pointed to the project security guide (Go CVEs are tracked and fixed on the standard schedule). [ref: https://github.com/kubernetes/kubernetes/issues/140091]
